steps.title: Write each bin amount
steps.content: Each small bin holds $1$ fish, so $s$ small bins hold $s$ fish. Each large bin holds $2$ fish, so $b$ large bins hold $2b$ fish.

steps.title: Model the total fish
steps.content: The total number of fish is $43$, so add the fish from the small and large bins. $$s+2b=43$$ The answer is A.
